results.rendered_html:
ubhayadyus (u˚ + dyus) adv. an beiden d. h. an zwei aufeinanderfolgenden Tagen (Gegens. anyedyus)  P. 5,3,22, Vārtt. 7 .  AK. 3,5,21 . (takmā) yo anyedyurubhayadyurabhyeti  AV. 1,25,4 . 7,116,2 . munuṣyebhya ubhayadyurupa haranti 8,10,21 .
— Vgl. ubhayedyus.
